# rmqctl Tool Reference

- Source catalog version: `1.0.0`
- Minimum client version: `1.0.0`
- Source SHA-256: `96296f0aacedd922ccfb075dda39fab90e80e92e68621bed7d4a3c27221745aa`

## `rmq.capabilities`

- CLI: `rmqctl capabilities get`
- Risk: `L1`
- Permission: `cluster:read`
- Required capabilities: None
- Description: Describe the capabilities of one RocketMQ cluster.

## `rmq.cluster.list`

- CLI: `rmqctl cluster list`
- Risk: `L1`
- Permission: `cluster:read`
- Required capabilities: None
- Description: List RocketMQ clusters available in Studio.
